metadata.name: skyshapython
metadata.summary: A Python library for utilities and wrappers for frequently used functionality.

classes.name: skyshapython.maxheap.MaxHeap

methods.name: skyshapython.maxheap.MaxHeap.__init__
documentation: Use a list to store the heap elements (inverted for max-heap behavior).

methods.name: skyshapython.maxheap.MaxHeap.push
documentation:
Adds an item to the heap.

Usage:
    your_max_heap.push(value)

methods.name: skyshapython.maxheap.MaxHeap.pop
documentation:
Removes and returns the largest item from the heap.

Usage:
    your_max_heap.pop()

methods.name: skyshapython.maxheap.MaxHeap.pushpop
documentation:
Adds an item to the heap and removes/returns the largest item.
This is more efficient than calling push() followed by pop().

Usage:
    largest_value = your_max_heap.pushpop(some_value)

methods.name: skyshapython.maxheap.MaxHeap.peek
documentation:
Returns the largest item without removing it.

Usage:
    your_max_heap.peek()

methods.name: skyshapython.maxheap.MaxHeap.__len__
documentation:
Returns the number of elements in the heap.

Usage:
    len(your_max_heap)

methods.name: skyshapython.maxheap.MaxHeap.__bool__

documentation: A simple MaxHeap implementation using Python's built-in heapq library.

classes.name: skyshapython.minheap.MinHeap

methods.name: skyshapython.minheap.MinHeap.__init__
documentation: Use a list to store the heap elements.

methods.name: skyshapython.minheap.MinHeap.push
documentation:
Adds an item to the heap.

Usage:
    your_min_heap.push(value)

methods.name: skyshapython.minheap.MinHeap.pop
documentation:
Removes and returns the smallest item from the heap.

Usage:
    smallest_value = your_min_heap.pop()

methods.name: skyshapython.minheap.MinHeap.pushpop
documentation:
Adds an item to the heap and removes/returns the smallest item.
This is more efficient than calling push() followed by pop().

Usage:
    smallest_value = your_min_heap.pushpop(some_value)

methods.name: skyshapython.minheap.MinHeap.peek
documentation:
Returns the smallest item without removing it.

Usage:
    smallest_value = your_min_heap.peek()

methods.name: skyshapython.minheap.MinHeap.__len__
documentation:
Returns the number of elements in the heap.

Usage:
    len(your_min_heap)

methods.name: skyshapython.minheap.MinHeap.__bool__

documentation: A simple MinHeap implementation using Python's built-in heapq library.
